mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decision_signals (stock_code, stock_name, market, source_type, source_agent, source_report_id, trace_id, market_phase, trigger_source, action, action_label, confidence, score, horizon, entry_low, entry_high, stop_loss, target_price, invalidation, watch_conditions, reason, risk_summary, catalyst_summary, evidence, data_quality_summary, plan_quality, status, expires_at, metadata, report_language, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{market}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceAgent}, #{sourceReportId}, #{traceId}, #{marketPhase}, #{triggerSource}, #{action}, #{actionLabel}, #{confidence}, #{score}, #{horizon}, #{entryLow}, #{entryHigh}, #{stopLoss}, #{targetPrice}, #{invalidation}, #{watchConditions}, #{reason}, #{riskSummary}, #{catalystSummary}, #{evidence}, #{dataQualitySummary}, #{planQuality}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{metadata}, #{reportLanguage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE decision_signals SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, market=#{market}, source_type=#{sourceType}, source_agent=#{sourceAgent}, source_report_id=#{sourceReportId}, trace_id=#{traceId}, market_phase=#{marketPhase}, trigger_source=#{triggerSource}, action=#{action}, action_label=#{actionLabel}, confidence=#{confidence}, score=#{score}, horizon=#{horizon}, entry_low=#{entryLow}, entry_high=#{entryHigh}, stop_loss=#{stopLoss}, target_price=#{targetPrice}, invalidation=#{invalidation}, watch_conditions=#{watchConditions}, reason=#{reason}, risk_summary=#{riskSummary}, catalyst_summary=#{catalystSummary}, evidence=#{evidence}, data_quality_summary=#{dataQualitySummary}, plan_quality=#{planQuality}, status=#{status}, expires_at=#{expiresAt}, metadata=#{metadata}, report_language=#{reportLanguage}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM decision_signals ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND created_at > #{after} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE created_at > #{after} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE decision_signals SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decision_signals (stock_code, stock_name, signal_type, strength, source, target_price, stop_loss_price, trigger_price, position_pct, reasoning, confidence, status, valid_until, report_id, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{signalType}, #{strength}, #{source}, #{targetPrice}, #{stopLossPrice}, #{triggerPrice}, #{positionPct}, #{reasoning}, #{confidence}, #{status}, #{validUntil}, #{reportId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE decision_signals SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, signal_type=#{signalType}, strength=#{strength}, source=#{source}, target_price=#{targetPrice}, stop_loss_price=#{stopLossPrice}, trigger_price=#{triggerPrice}, position_pct=#{positionPct}, reasoning=#{reasoning}, confidence=#{confidence}, status=#{status}, valid_until=#{validUntil}, report_id=#{reportId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE signal_type = #{signalType} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND created_at > #{after}
